title: Tolling Management Domain Pack Dataset
summary: Static domain-pack benchmark slice covering tolling trip posting, image review, support safety, security, and ROI evidence.

documents.title: Trip Posting
documents.reason: Defines idempotent posting, duplicate detection, exceptions, and tests.

documents.title: Business Rules
documents.reason: Defines audit, idempotency, duplicate, exception, and cost rule categories.

documents.title: Security And Privacy
documents.reason: Defines sensitive data and audit requirements for tolling tasks.

documents.title: Entity Contract
documents.reason: Defines LaneEvent, Trip, TollTransaction, and AuditEvent.

reuse_targets.title: Trip posting playbook
reuse_targets.reason: Avoid re-explaining duplicate posting and idempotency every run.

reuse_targets.title: Tolling entity model
reuse_targets.reason: Keep transaction and audit vocabulary stable across tasks.

policy_targets: Do not invent toll rates, fee amounts, deadlines, or legal outcomes.
Do not include raw customer PII, raw plate images, card data, or bank data.
Require audit for money-changing, evidence-changing, account-status, dispute, waiver, and collections actions.
